name: serpapi
description: Structured Google search, news, maps, and shopping results through the SerpApi search API

envVars.name: SERPAPI_API_KEY
envVars.description: SerpApi private API key from your account dashboard

tools.name: Google Search
tools.description: Run a Google web search and get structured organic results, answer boxes, and related data

engine.description: SerpApi engine to use; google returns standard web results

q.description: Search query, supporting regular Google operators like site:, OR, and quoted phrases

location.description: Geographic origin of the search, e.g. Austin, Texas, United States

num.description: Maximum number of results to return (e.g. 10, 20, up to 100)

start.description: Result offset for pagination (0 is the first page, 10 the second, ...)

tools.name: Google News Search
tools.description: Search Google News and get structured article results with titles, sources, and publish dates

engine.description: SerpApi engine to use; google_news returns news article results

tools.name: Google Maps Search
tools.description: Search Google Maps for places and get structured local results with addresses, ratings, and coordinates

engine.description: SerpApi engine to use; google_maps returns local place results

q.description: Place or business search query, e.g. coffee shops

ll.description: GPS coordinates to center the search, in the form @latitude,longitude,zoom (e.g. @40.7455096,-74.0083012,14z)

tools.name: Google Shopping Search
tools.description: Search Google Shopping and get structured product results with prices, merchants, and ratings

engine.description: SerpApi engine to use; google_shopping returns product results

SETUP_GUIDE.title: SerpApi setup

steps.title: Create a SerpApi account
steps.description: Sign up at https://serpapi.com/users/sign_up. The free plan includes a monthly allowance of searches, which is enough for testing.

steps.title: Copy your private API key
steps.description: Open https://serpapi.com/manage-api-key and copy the private API key shown for your account.

steps.title: Store the key
steps.description: Set the key as SERPAPI_API_KEY. You can verify it works by opening https://serpapi.com/search?engine=google&q=coffee&api_key=YOUR_KEY in a browser and checking that JSON results come back.

notes: SerpApi authenticates by passing the API key as an api_key query parameter on every request (https://serpapi.com/search?engine=google&q=...&api_key=...); it does not accept the key in an HTTP header.
Each request consumes one search from your plan; the engine parameter selects the result type (google, google_news, google_maps, google_shopping, and more).
